For Toronto Realtors · 2026

A simpler way to handle rental applications.

Send applicants a link — standardized applications land in your dashboard automatically. Shortlist, document decisions, and send a polished report to your landlord client in one click.

Standardized applications. Documented decisions. One dashboard.

How it works

Rentletter organizes your applicants. Run credit checks wherever you already do.

01

Create your listing

Add the unit. We generate a link tied to that listing.

02

Share with applicants

Text or email the link. Standardized applications route to your dashboard automatically.

03

Review and shortlist

Compare candidates side-by-side. Score, shortlist, document every decision.

04

Send to your landlord

One click — a co-branded report with your name on it, free for you.

Set up your first listing.

Free during launch. No credit card. No setup.
